nasb.text: These are the sons of Ham, according to their families, according to their languages, by their lands, by their nations.

esv.text: These are the sons of Ham, by their clans, their languages, their lands, and their nations.

cnv.text: 這些人都是含的子孫，隨著自己的宗族、方言，住在自己的國土中。

ccb.text: 以上记载的都是含的子孙，他们根据自己的宗族、语言、地域和民族散居各处。

csbs.text: 以上是含的子孙，各随自己的家族、自己的语言、自己的地方、自己的国家。
